leadText: The Blank Plate (Japanese: まっさらプレート Blank Plate) is a Key Item in Pokémon Legends: Arceus. It is one of the Plates, which are associated with Arceus.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] When used from the satchel on Arceus , the Blank Plate changes it to the Normal type . The Blank Plate can be read, and has the following engraving: "Three beings whose power can hold both time and space fixed."

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text: Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Games Method LA Snowpoint Temple (reward for catching Regigigas at the end of Mission 24: "The Plate of Snowpoint Temple")

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description LA S V A stone tablet imbued with the essence of normalcy. When used on a certain Pokémon, it allows that Pokémon to gain the power of the Normal type.

sections.title: In the core series games
sections.text: Contents 1 In the core series games 1.1 Effect 1.2 Description 1.3 Acquisition In the core series games [ edit | edit source ] Effect [ edit | edit source ] When used from the satchel on Arceus , the Blank Plate changes it to the Normal type . The Blank Plate can be read, and has the following engraving: "Three beings whose power can hold both time and space fixed." Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description LA S V A stone tablet imbued with the essence of normalcy. When used on a certain Pokémon, it allows that Pokémon to gain the power of the Normal type. Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Games Method LA Snowpoint Temple (reward for catching Regigigas at the end of Mission 24: "The Plate of Snowpoint Temple")
